findings.message: GraphQL mutation accepts 'description' parameter but never uses it. The parameter is not passed to repository.create_item() (line 40) and the underlying Item model has no description field. Clients will be misled into providing input that is silently ignored.
findings.suggestion: Remove the 'description' parameter from the mutation signature, or implement full support by: (1) adding a description field to the Item model, (2) updating repository.create_item() to accept and persist the description, and (3) updating the GraphQL Item type to include the description field.
